S.FORM: Ralph Beard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1927, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 12, Ralph Beard, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ralpńß ő≤ear* s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, ralpńß ő≤ear*, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
